channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Netanyahu authorizes direct talks with Lebanon in potential boost to ceasefire efforts - AP News
item.description:
1. Netanyahu authorizes direct talks with Lebanon in potential boost to ceasefire efforts  AP News
  2. Live updates: Israel says it will begin direct negotiations with Lebanon as US prepares for Iran ceasefire talks  CNN
  3. Trump confirms he asked Netanyahu for a more ‘low-key’ campaign against Hezbollah  The Times of Israel
  4. Iran war live: Israel to hold ceasefire talks with Lebanon  Al Jazeera
  5. Middle East crisis live: Israel ready ’to begin direct negotiations’ with Lebanon as Trump ‘optimistic’ about fragile ceasefire  The Guardian

item.title: European Leaders Demand That U.S. Cease-Fire With Iran Include Lebanon - The New York Times
item.description:
1. European Leaders Demand That U.S. Cease-Fire With Iran Include Lebanon  The New York Times
  2. Netanyahu: We are continuing to strike Hezbollah, goal in talks is 'historic peace agreement' with Lebanon  The Times of Israel
  3. Oil Rally Fades as Israel Agrees to Talks With Lebanon  Bloomberg.com
  4. Why is Israel bombing Lebanon? What to know after deadly attacks.  USA Today
  5. Lebanon thought there was a ceasefire - then Israel unleashed deadly blitz  BBC

item.title: Hungary voters want new EU approach, but tough on Ukraine - DW.com
item.description:
1. Hungary voters want new EU approach, but tough on Ukraine  DW.com

  4. A Last Chance for Hungary: Orban’s Mafia State Could Fall—or Cement Itself  Foreign Affairs
  5. Hungary's election could end Orban era and reshape its place in Europe  Reuters

item.title: A deal or a mirage? Trump’s Iran ceasefire collides with chaos on the ground - CNN
item.description:
1. A deal or a mirage? Trump’s Iran ceasefire collides with chaos on the ground  CNN
  2. What’s in the Iran war ceasefire? The two sides can’t seem to even agree on that.  CNN
  3. Iran’s president says ceasefire was approved by the supreme leader  The Times of Israel
  4. What Is In Iran’s 10-Point Proposal, and How Does It Compare to U.S. Demands?  The New York Times
  5. After five weeks of the Iran war, is the U.S. better off?  NBC News

item.title: UK exposes covert Russian submarine operation in and around UK waters - navalnews.com
item.description:
1. UK exposes covert Russian submarine operation in and around UK waters  navalnews.com
  2. UK says Russia ran submarine operation over cables and pipelines  BBC
  3. UK says three Russian submarines tracked during ‘covert’ operation  Al Jazeera
  4. UK navy foiled Russian submarines surveying undersea cables, defence minister says  The Guardian
  5. 3 Russian Submarines Detected Near Britain Were Spying, U.K. Says  The New York Times

item.title: In the Trump era, everybody's talking about 'soft power.' But ... what is it exactly? - NPR
item.description:
1. In the Trump era, everybody's talking about 'soft power.' But ... what is it exactly?  NPR
  2. Strategic Impatience and the Undoing of American Soft Power  USC Center on Public Diplomacy |
  3. Mellen Duffy Tanamly & Arthur Greenberg: Closing USAID and its deadly consequences  UnionLeader.com
  4. Devex Pro Insider: A humanitarian reset under fire  Devex
  5. Dark Money for Soft Power  Puck

item.title: A man stole a handbag outside a London pub. Inside was a Faberge egg and watch worth nearly $3 million. - CBS News
item.description:
1. A man stole a handbag outside a London pub. Inside was a Faberge egg and watch worth nearly $3 million.  CBS News
  2. Man jailed for stealing handbag that contained £2.2m Fabergé egg  BBC
  3. London pub thief sold £2.2m Fabergé egg and watch set to buy drugs  The Guardian
  4. Moment thief snatches handbag containing £2.2m Faberge egg from London pub  Yahoo
  5. A casual get-together, a Fabergé egg and the bag snatcher who landed the luckiest haul of his life  The Telegraph

item.title: NATO's Rutte told allies Trump wants Hormuz commitments within days, diplomats say - CNBC
item.description:
1. NATO's Rutte told allies Trump wants Hormuz commitments within days, diplomats say  CNBC
  2. Rutte the ‘Trump whisperer’ faces a fresh test as the US leader turns on NATO over Iran  AP News
  3. NATO chief insists Europe is ‘scrambling’ to help with Iran war after latest Trump attacks  Politico
  4. Rutte Pushes European Nations to Secure Strait of Hormuz  WSJ
  5. Iran War: US Asks Allies for Quick Plans to Secure Hormuz After Ceasefire  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Hormuz Traffic Still Blocked as Iran Tries to Formalize Control - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Hormuz Traffic Still Blocked as Iran Tries to Formalize Control  Bloomberg.com
  2. Strait of Hormuz shipping traffic is effectively at a standstill despite Iran ceasefire  NBC News
  3. Hormuz Strait oil traffic way down after ceasefire; Hassett says even one tanker is big deal  CNBC
  4. Which Asian countries' ships are passing through the Strait of Hormuz?  BBC
  5. Organized Money: Up Ship’s Creek: The Crisis at the Strait  The American Prospect

item.title: Head of IMF says Iran war will permanently scar global economy even if peace is reached - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Head of IMF says Iran war will permanently scar global economy even if peace is reached  The Guardian
  2. Opinion | I Studied the Economic Fallout From World War I. This Could Be Worse Than We Expect.  The New York Times
  3. Iran war's economic aftershocks will be felt for some time  Axios
  4. IMF warns of looming inflation crisis on back of US-Israel war on Iran  Al Jazeera
  5. IMF Chief Says Oil Shock Tests a World With Little Fiscal Buffer  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Emperor Penguins Are Now Endangered, a New Assessment Finds - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Emperor Penguins Are Now Endangered, a New Assessment Finds  The New York Times

  3. Mass drowning of chicks puts emperor penguins at risk of extinction  The Guardian
  4. Emperor penguin, Antarctic fur seal now listed as endangered in updated IUCN Red List  ABC News
  5. Emperor Penguins Declared Endangered as Antarctica Loses Ice  Bloomberg.com

item.title: US military 'loading up and resting,' Trump says, as Iran tests ceasefire - Fox News
item.description:
1. US military 'loading up and resting,' Trump says, as Iran tests ceasefire  Fox News

  3. ‘Missiles are ready to launch,’ says Iranian official, warning ceasefire could collapse  The Times of Israel
  4. Iran closes strait, challenges U.S. to rein in Israel: 'the world is watching whether it will act on its commitments'  Fortune
  5. Trump’s War Partner Fumes After He Blindsides Them  The Daily Beast

item.title: Has US achieved its war objectives in Iran? - Yahoo
item.description: Has US achieved its war objectives in Iran?  YahooView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: UK rejects tolls on Strait of Hormuz - politico.eu
item.description:
1. UK rejects tolls on Strait of Hormuz  politico.eu

  3. Britain to call for toll-free Strait of Hormuz, says Lebanon must be part of Iran ceasefire  CNBC
  4. Israel’s attacks on Lebanon should not be happening, says Keir Starmer  The Guardian
  5. ‘Unacceptable’: European countries slam IDF strikes on Hezbollah amid US-Iran truce  The Times of Israel

item.title: Against the Mad King Trump makes technocracy look good - UnHerd
item.description:
1. Against the Mad King Trump makes technocracy look good  UnHerd
  2. Strait of Hormuz toll would set 'dangerous precedent,' UN shipping agency warns  Fox News

  4. How Tolls in the Strait of Hormuz Would Undercut International Law  The New York Times
  5. Trump Finally Found a Carbon Tax He Can Love  Heatmap News
